case_title: WEISSMAN, AMY VS FERRARI, DOUG INDIVIDUALLY + DBA JOKECO

docket_entries.description: I F P HEARING ON APPEAL DENIED, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $920.00 FILED BY WEISSMAN, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI, DOUG INDIVIDUALLY + DBA JOKECO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISSMAN, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERRARI, DOUG INDIVIDUALLY + DBA JOKECO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00, DEFENDANT TO RETURN JOKES PRESENTLY IN HER POSSES- SION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
I F P ON APPEAL, NOT ABLE TO PROCESS IN ACCOUNTING MENU; SENT TO DEPT. 6.
